requirement_topic.zh: 制冷剂可接受性——EPA SNAP计划
requirement_topic.zht: 製冷劑可接受性——EPA SNAP計劃

summary.en: The US Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) Significant New Alternatives Policy (SNAP) programme under Section 612 of the Clean Air Act evaluates and lists substitutes for ozone-depleting substances (ODS) in end-uses including domestic refrigeration. Refrigerants used in household refrigerators sold in the US must be on the EPA SNAP acceptable list for domestic refrigeration. R-600a (isobutane) is listed as acceptable for household refrigerators under SNAP, subject to charge-size limits and flammability requirements. R-134a is also acceptable. Refrigerants not on the SNAP acceptable list — or listed as unacceptable or phased out — cannot legally be used. Importers must verify the refrigerant in their product is on the current SNAP acceptable list for the domestic refrigeration end-use.
summary.zh: 美国环境保护局（EPA）依据《清洁空气法》第612条实施的重大新替代品政策（SNAP）计划，评估并列出包括家用制冷在内的各终端用途的消耗臭氧层物质（ODS）替代品。在美国销售的家用电冰箱使用的制冷剂须列于EPA SNAP家用制冷可接受名单。R-600a（异丁烷）已列为家用冰箱可接受制冷剂，须满足充注量限制及可燃性要求。R-134a同样被列为可接受。未列于SNAP可接受名单，或已被列为不可接受或淘汰的制冷剂，不得合法使用。进口商须核实其产品使用的制冷剂是否列于当前SNAP家用制冷终端用途可接受名单。
summary.zht: 美國環境保護局（EPA）依據《清潔空氣法》第612條實施的重大新替代品政策（SNAP）計劃，評估並列出包括家用製冷在內的各終端用途的消耗臭氧層物質（ODS）替代品。在美國銷售的家用電冰箱使用的製冷劑須列於EPA SNAP家用製冷可接受名單。R-600a（異丁烷）已列為家用冰箱可接受製冷劑，須滿足充注量限制及可燃性要求。R-134a同樣被列為可接受。未列於SNAP可接受名單，或已被列為不可接受或淘汰的製冷劑，不得合法使用。進口商須核實其產品使用的製冷劑是否列於當前SNAP家用製冷終端用途可接受名單。

standards_or_laws: 42 U.S.C. § 7671k — Clean Air Act Section 612 (SNAP programme statutory basis)
40 CFR Part 82 Subpart G — EPA SNAP regulations

summary.en: China regulates refrigerants through the Montreal Protocol implementation framework administered by the Ministry of Ecology and Environment (MEE) and NDRC. Permitted refrigerants for household refrigerators in China include R-600a and R-134a, consistent with HFC phase-down commitments under the Kigali Amendment. Chinese refrigerant regulations and SNAP are aligned on the main refrigerants used in household refrigerators (R-600a, R-134a), so a Chinese-market refrigerator using these refrigerants is not expected to face a refrigerant-acceptability gap in the US SNAP context. However, importers must independently verify the specific refrigerant code in their product against the current SNAP list before import.
summary.zh: 中国通过生态环境部和国家发展和改革委员会管理的《蒙特利尔议定书》实施框架监管制冷剂。中国家用电冰箱允许使用的制冷剂包括R-600a和R-134a，与《基加利修正案》下的氢氟碳化物削减承诺一致。中国制冷剂法规与SNAP在家用冰箱主流制冷剂（R-600a、R-134a）上基本一致，因此使用上述制冷剂的中国市场电冰箱，预计不会在美国SNAP制冷剂可接受性方面产生差距。但进口商在进口前须独立核实其产品具体制冷剂型号是否列于当前SNAP名单。
summary.zht: 中國通過生態環境部和國家發展和改革委員會管理的《蒙特利爾議定書》實施框架監管製冷劑。中國家用電冰箱允許使用的製冷劑包括R-600a和R-134a，與《基加利修正案》下的氫氟碳化物削減承諾一致。中國製冷劑法規與SNAP在家用冰箱主流製冷劑（R-600a、R-134a）上基本一致，因此使用上述製冷劑的中國市場電冰箱，預計不會在美國SNAP製冷劑可接受性方面產生差距。但進口商在進口前須獨立核實其產品具體製冷劑型號是否列於當前SNAP名單。

standards_or_laws: GB 9237-2001 — Safety requirements for refrigerating systems and heat pumps (Chinese refrigerant safety framework)
MEE / NDRC Montreal Protocol implementation regulations

gap.en: The main practical gap is flammability handling for R-600a (A3 flammability class). US safety certification under UL 60335-2-24 includes specific requirements for flammable refrigerant charge limits (typically 57 g maximum for R-600a in household refrigerators), refrigerant detector requirements, and labelling. Importers must confirm the specific charge size and UL 60335-2-24 flammable refrigerant provisions are met. Additionally, if any non-standard or newer refrigerant is used (e.g., R-290, R-441A), its specific SNAP listing and conditions of use must be verified before import.
gap.zh: 主要实际差距在于R-600a（A3可燃性等级）的可燃性处理。依据UL 60335-2-24的美国安全认证包含对可燃制冷剂充注量的具体要求（家用冰箱R-600a通常最高57克）、制冷剂探测器要求及标签要求。进口商须确认具体充注量及UL 60335-2-24可燃制冷剂条款均已满足。此外，若使用任何非标准或较新制冷剂（如R-290、R-441A），须在进口前核实其具体SNAP列名及使用条件。
gap.zht: 主要實際差距在於R-600a（A3可燃性等級）的可燃性處理。依據UL 60335-2-24的美國安全認證包含對可燃製冷劑充注量的具體要求（家用冰箱R-600a通常最高57克）、製冷劑探測器要求及標籤要求。進口商須確認具體充注量及UL 60335-2-24可燃製冷劑條款均已滿足。此外，若使用任何非標準或較新製冷劑（如R-290、R-441A），須在進口前核實其具體SNAP列名及使用條件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — only EPA SNAP-listed acceptable refrigerants may be used in products sold in the US; flammable refrigerant charge limits under UL 60335-2-24 are a mandatory safety requirement
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — MEE / NDRC refrigerant regulations govern permitted refrigerants in China; R-600a and R-134a are permitted for household refrigerators

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Refrigerant acceptability under EPA SNAP is mandatory. R-600a and R-134a are listed as acceptable for domestic refrigeration. Chinese products using these refrigerants are not expected to face a SNAP gap, but importers must verify the specific refrigerant code and R-600a charge size against UL 60335-2-24 flammable refrigerant provisions. Any non-standard refrigerant requires separate SNAP verification before import.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 【仅供参考】EPA SNAP下的制冷剂可接受性属强制要求。R-600a和R-134a已列为家用制冷可接受制冷剂。使用上述制冷剂的中国产品预计不会面临SNAP差距，但进口商须核实具体制冷剂型号及R-600a充注量是否符合UL 60335-2-24可燃制冷剂条款。任何非标准制冷剂在进口前须独立进行SNAP核实。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 【僅供參考】EPA SNAP下的製冷劑可接受性屬強制要求。R-600a和R-134a已列為家用製冷可接受製冷劑。使用上述製冷劑的中國產品預計不會面臨SNAP差距，但進口商須核實具體製冷劑型號及R-600a充注量是否符合UL 60335-2-24可燃製冷劑條款。任何非標準製冷劑在進口前須獨立進行SNAP核實。

requirement_topic.en: AIM Act — HFC Phasedown and Refrigerant GWP Restrictions
requirement_topic.zh: AIM法案——氢氟碳化物淘汰及制冷剂GWP限制
requirement_topic.zht: AIM法案——氫氟碳化物淘汰及製冷劑GWP限制

summary.en: The American Innovation and Manufacturing (AIM) Act of 2020 (Section 103 of the Consolidated Appropriations Act, 2021) authorises EPA to phase down the production and consumption of hydrofluorocarbons (HFCs) in the US. Under the AIM Act, EPA has promulgated rules restricting the use of high-GWP HFCs in specific end-uses (the "Technology Transitions" rule, 40 CFR Part 84 Subpart B). For domestic refrigeration (household refrigerators and freezers), the Technology Transitions rule sets GWP limits on refrigerants used in new equipment. As of 2026, R-134a (GWP ~1430) is subject to phasedown but remains permitted in existing certified products; new product lines may face GWP limits going forward. R-600a (GWP ~3) is well within any expected GWP limit and is not affected. Importers should verify the current AIM Act Technology Transitions rule applicability for their specific product class and refrigerant before import.
summary.zh: 2020年《美国创新和制造法案》（AIM法案，2021年综合拨款法案第103条）授权EPA逐步削减美国氢氟碳化物（HFC）的生产和消费。依据AIM法案，EPA已颁布规则限制高GWP HFC在特定终端用途的使用（"技术转型"规则，40 CFR第84部分B子部分）。针对家用制冷（家用冰箱及冷冻箱），技术转型规则对新设备使用的制冷剂设定了GWP限值。截至2026年，R-134a（GWP约1430）受淘汰限制，但在现有认证产品中仍被允许；新产品线未来可能面临GWP限制。R-600a（GWP约3）远低于任何预期GWP限值，不受影响。进口商在进口前应核实AIM法案技术转型规则对其特定产品类别和制冷剂的适用情况。
summary.zht: 2020年《美國創新和製造法案》（AIM法案，2021年綜合撥款法案第103條）授權EPA逐步削減美國氫氟碳化物（HFC）的生產和消費。依據AIM法案，EPA已頒布規則限制高GWP HFC在特定終端用途的使用（"技術轉型"規則，40 CFR第84部分B子部分）。針對家用製冷（家用電冰箱及冷凍箱），技術轉型規則對新設備使用的製冷劑設定了GWP限值。截至2026年，R-134a（GWP約1430）受淘汰限制，但在現有認證產品中仍被允許；新產品線未來可能面臨GWP限制。R-600a（GWP約3）遠低於任何預期GWP限值，不受影響。進口商在進口前應核實AIM法案技術轉型規則對其特定產品類別和製冷劑的適用情況。

standards_or_laws: AIM Act — American Innovation and Manufacturing Act of 2020 (Pub. L. 116-260, Division S, Section 103)
40 CFR Part 84 — HFC phasedown regulations (EPA AIM Act Technology Transitions rule)

summary.en: China is a party to the Kigali Amendment to the Montreal Protocol and is implementing HFC phasedown under the MEE / NDRC framework. China's phase-down schedule differs from the US AIM Act schedule (China is a Article 5 developing-country party with a different baseline and timeline). Chinese manufacturers transitioning to R-600a for export are aligned with long-term AIM Act direction. R-134a is not currently prohibited in Chinese household refrigerators but is subject to HFC reduction commitments.
summary.zh: 中国已批准《蒙特利尔议定书》基加利修正案，并在生态环境部/国家发展和改革委员会框架下推进氢氟碳化物削减。中国的削减时间表与美国AIM法案时间表不同（中国为第5条发展中国家缔约方，基准值和时间表有所不同）。出口转型至R-600a的中国制造商，与AIM法案长期方向一致。R-134a目前在中国家用冰箱中未被禁止，但受氢氟碳化物削减承诺约束。
summary.zht: 中國已批准《蒙特利爾議定書》基加利修正案，並在生態環境部/國家發展和改革委員會框架下推進氫氟碳化物削減。中國的削減時間表與美國AIM法案時間表不同（中國為第5條發展中國家締約方，基準值和時間表有所不同）。出口轉型至R-600a的中國製造商，與AIM法案長期方向一致。R-134a目前在中國家用冰箱中未被禁止，但受氫氟碳化物削減承諾約束。

standards_or_laws: Kigali Amendment to the Montreal Protocol — HFC phasedown commitments (China Article 5 party)
MEE HFC management regulations (China domestic implementation)

gap.en: The immediate practical gap is monitoring: US AIM Act Technology Transitions rules for domestic refrigeration are evolving (EPA has issued final rules with compliance dates staggered through the late 2020s). Exporters using R-134a must track whether their specific product class and manufacture date triggers a GWP prohibition under the current Technology Transitions rule before importing to the US. Exporters using R-600a face no current AIM Act GWP gap. Importers should consult the current 40 CFR Part 84 Subpart B table for domestic refrigeration GWP limits applicable at the time of import.
gap.zh: 当前主要实际差距在于监控：美国AIM法案针对家用制冷的技术转型规则仍在持续演进（EPA已发布最终规则，合规日期分阶段延伸至2020年代末）。使用R-134a的出口商须在进口前追踪其特定产品类别和生产日期，是否触发当前技术转型规则下的GWP禁止规定。使用R-600a的出口商目前不存在AIM法案GWP差距。进口商应查阅当时适用于家用制冷的40 CFR第84部分B子部分GWP限值表。
gap.zht: 當前主要實際差距在於監控：美國AIM法案針對家用製冷的技術轉型規則仍在持續演進（EPA已發布最終規則，合規日期分階段延伸至2020年代末）。使用R-134a的出口商須在進口前追蹤其特定產品類別和生產日期，是否觸發當前技術轉型規則下的GWP禁止規定。使用R-600a的出口商目前不存在AIM法案GWP差距。進口商應查閱當時適用於家用製冷的40 CFR第84部分B子部分GWP限值表。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — AIM Act Technology Transitions GWP limits apply to new equipment; evolving compliance dates require verification at time of import
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary / treaty obligation — China HFC phasedown under Kigali Amendment; no domestic GWP limit specifically for household refrigerators as of 2026 (subject to MEE updates)

source.publisher: US Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) — AIM Act

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] AIM Act Technology Transitions rules impose mandatory GWP limits on refrigerants in new domestic refrigeration equipment. R-600a (GWP ~3) is not affected. R-134a (GWP ~1430) is subject to phasedown; exporters using R-134a must verify current AIM Act compliance dates for their product class before US import. The regulatory landscape is evolving — check current 40 CFR Part 84 Subpart B at time of import.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 【仅供参考】AIM法案技术转型规则对新家用制冷设备制冷剂的GWP设定强制限制。R-600a（GWP约3）不受影响。R-134a（GWP约1430）受淘汰限制，使用R-134a的出口商须在进口前核实其产品类别的当前AIM法案合规日期。法规环境持续演进——进口时应查阅当前40 CFR第84部分B子部分。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 【僅供參考】AIM法案技術轉型規則對新家用製冷設備製冷劑的GWP設定強制限制。R-600a（GWP約3）不受影響。R-134a（GWP約1430）受淘汰限制，使用R-134a的出口商須在進口前核實其產品類別的當前AIM法案合規日期。法規環境持續演進——進口時應查閱當前40 CFR第84部分B子部分。
